title: astragalus ahangarensis
intro: Astragalus ahangarensis is a species of flowering plant in the legume family Fabaceae, native to Iran. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus ahangarensis are said to include reducing stress and anxiety, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative damage. Astragalus ahangarensis can be prepared into various herbal products, such as capsules, teas, and extracts, to be used for medicinal purposes.
